original_image_tags: A technical line plot showing ship-hit probability contours for the Atlas IIAS rocket. The chart is titled "Atlas IIAS All Mode P_I".

elements.description: A line graph showing 'Atlas IIAS All-Mode Ship-Hit Contours'. The y-axis is 'Crossrange Distance (nm)' ranging from -15 to 15. The x-axis is 'Downrange Distance (nm)' ranging from -5 to 25. A legend indicates three contour lines: a solid line for '10^-4', a dashed line for '10^-5', and a dotted line for '10^-6'. Text within the graph area reads 'Atlas IIAS', 'All Mode P_I', 'B = 1,000', and 'A = 3.45'. Below the graph is the caption: 'Figure 19. Atlas IIAS All-Mode Ship-Hit Contours with A = 3.45'.

judge.reason: Both descriptions agree on the chart title, type, and key quoted text ('Atlas IIAS All-Mode Ship-Hit Contours' / 'All Mode P_I'), with only minor differences in axis labels and the omission of some details by Description A, indicating no factual contradiction on visual content.
